artPrompt: The eerie instant of an impossible tally: glowing green sludge-counters drift upward like luminous ballots from a brimming reservoir, multiplying as a hand reaches into the murk to count them, each orb pulsing sickly bioluminescence. Rusted pipes and litter frame the toxic water under a bruised sky. One cold storm-light pierces the dark over the rising count, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Recount the Runoff
text: Count the sludge counters on each creature you control. Draw a card if that total is three or more. Draw two cards instead if it's seven or more. Demand a recount if you don't like how many you drew. (You can't actually recount. The reservoir already counted.)
flavorText: Every ballot was a fish. Every fish voted twice.
